channel.title: User Feedback on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in User Feedback on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: User feedback logging in Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry preview adds end-user feedback logging for AI agents. It lets developers capture structured user feedback such as thumbs up/down, ratings, and custom annotations, and associate that feedback with agent interactions.

  • Source: Azure Updates
